questions.stem: Olivia ___ her bed every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示平常習慣，Olivia 是第三人稱單數，所以用 makes。

questions.stem: We ___ the classroom windows on hot days.
questions.explanation: on hot days 表示平常會做的事，主詞是 we，所以用 open。

questions.stem: Dad ___ the bus to work every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示習慣，Dad 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 takes。

questions.stem: I ___ my shoes near the door every evening.
questions.explanation: every evening 表示固定習慣，主詞是 I，所以用 keep。

questions.stem: The girls ___ dance videos after homework every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示平常的習慣，主詞是複數 girls，所以用 watch。

questions.stem: My cousin ___ with crayons in art class every week.
questions.explanation: every week 表示習慣，My cousin 是第三人稱單數，所以用 colors。

questions.stem: The farmer ___ eggs from the hens every morning.
questions.explanation: every morning 表示規律發生的事，The farmer 是第三人稱單數，所以用 gets。

questions.stem: They ___ to their grandma on Sundays.
questions.explanation: on Sundays 表示固定習慣，因此主詞 they 用 talk。

questions.stem: Leo ___ his lunch with his best friend every day.
questions.explanation: every day 表示平常習慣，Leo 是第三人稱單數，所以要用 shares。

questions.stem: We ___ around the lake on weekends.
questions.explanation: on weekends 表示平常習慣，主詞是 we，所以用 walk。

questions.stem: The baby ___ in a small bed every night.
questions.explanation: every night 表示習慣，The baby 是第三人稱單數，所以用 sleeps。

questions.stem: Mrs. Lin ___ us new words every week.
questions.explanation: every week 表示規律發生的事，Mrs. Lin 是第三人稱單數，所以用 teaches。

questions.stem: Olivia ___ her bed before school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 made。

questions.stem: We ___ the classroom windows this morning.
questions.explanation: this morning 表示已經發生的事，所以用 opened。

questions.stem: Dad ___ the bus to work yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 took。

questions.stem: I ___ my shoes near the door last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，因此要用 kept。

questions.stem: The girls ___ dance videos after homework yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以用 watched。

questions.stem: My cousin ___ with crayons in art class yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 colored。

questions.stem: The farmer ___ eggs from the hens yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 表示過去，所以要用 got。

questions.stem: They ___ to their grandma last Sunday.
questions.explanation: last Sunday 表示過去，因此要用 talked。

questions.stem: Leo ___ his lunch with his best friend yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 shared。

questions.stem: We ___ around the lake last weekend.
questions.explanation: last weekend 表示過去，因此要用 walked。

questions.stem: The baby ___ in a small bed last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，所以要用 slept。

questions.stem: Mrs. Lin ___ us new words yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 taught。

questions.stem: My brother ___ a kite at the park yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 flew。

questions.stem: The cook ___ soup for lunch yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 made。

questions.stem: Jenny ___ her coat in the car yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，所以要用 left。

questions.stem: The firefighters ___ the kitten in the tree yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，因此要用 found。

questions.stem: We ___ our teacher a thank-you card last week.
questions.explanation: last week 表示過去，所以要用 gave。

questions.stem: Uncle Ben ___ the gate before bedtime last night.
questions.explanation: last night 表示過去，因此要用 closed。
